textByHash.340cc8997b1dac8d5dbe98436250965f206ca780: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?
textByHash.e2d61a45774331b987e1966d6c9f24c8fb21c116: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.
textByHash.ffd903cdb5957a8042eafa088aecc5bb9f97b3dd: I got fish, you got gold?
textByHash.3445a64d69bf15b3930ce2c92c5446817e76553b: Then what are ye doin' in a fish shop? Looking fer work?
textByHash.c66934f129e51be5cea46019cc0fd406921be6bf: I dunno, I haven't gone through the last catch yet. What sort of a fish is it?
textByHash.2b0251339e9d102c4da8b336c429ff7938b12a39: Then I don't have any, and yer wastin' my time!
textByHash.66e266552d7f0b75d7caa36e8791a1c6159a9230: Ye wanna know what happened to my legs?
textByHash.c092cabc4519ff70c98de0b3ab460b80cce48dff: Yer too much of a lilly-livered, hat wearin' landlubber to know what happened to my legs!
textByHash.0096248cbb4133a1dcc67082027cd887f3b156e8: All right, lad, since yer so insistent, I'll tell ye.
textByHash.45d584dcd87b35639ed8cde36dd3176bbaba6e34: All right, lass, since yer so insistent, I'll tell ye.
textByHash.06951856453d8c8ebab6136ff4cdf175dc43c548: See, I was clingin' onto a barrel, me ship havin' just had an encounter with this albatross.
textByHash.6e4738bb43110c4b141f10c557fe3b331e9080ba: The sea was thrashin' and wild, but not so wild that I didn't see the fins of some sharks closin' in on me.
textByHash.f8f11236cc40e13f6f03ca891de82564dba5c325: I managed to yank a sliver of wood from the barrel just as one of them grabbed me from below, but I slipped down the things throat by about two feet before I managed te kill it.
textByHash.04809bc0e3a56cf3cffcb1433916bcf315b36841: A passin' ship saw the sharks and knew there would be survivors in the water. They sent a longboat and picked me up, but not before the sharks had taken off my legs.
textByHash.26f6b2502b20b7faa73f875e8e5d776f9e84abee: And that lad is why they call me two feet Charley, because they found me jammed two feet down a shark's throat.
textByHash.bbe33754714210ef0b87d63138c52ac240a78b10: And that lass is why they call me two feet Charley, because they found me jammed two feet down a shark's throat.
textByHash.f353fb71d6dcca74c5366372ef05308e4157f3c4: I knew ye couldn't handle the truth!
